items.briefing:
None of today's articles contain cyber security incidents or threats directly affecting Australian organisations or individuals. The closest relevant theme is a global trend of attackers increasingly exploiting AI tools to carry out attacks — a growing concern as Australian universities and organisations ramp up their own AI adoption. A separate report highlights ransomware continuing to disrupt business operations internationally, serving as a reminder of the ongoing risk.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation is adopting new AI tools, check with your IT team that those tools are sourced from trusted vendors and accessed only through approved channels.

featured.title: Anna Green named Chief Executive of Australian AFCX
featured.quote: New AFCX leader expands intelligence-sharing as Australia tightens scam regulations nationwide.
